text:
"Long Slow Pain" is a song from the film Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo. It is track 8 in the album Music from Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo, disc 2. https://vgmdb.net/album/35707 

Lyrics

 
Slow is the death of the weak and the tortured souls
dragged through the pain til their own nightmare is mortal

So will the afterlife bring peace or suffering? 
The only savior is solace from Misery.
